summary: Comprehensive testing of Bariatric Istanbul new features (iteration 5). All 35 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Admin panel in English, legal pages in Spanish, upload endpoint, footer links, contact info, no prices, cookie consent.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/upload requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/upload with auth returns URL and filename
Backend: Upload rejects invalid file types (.exe returns 400)
Backend: Upload accepts video files (.mp4)
Backend: /api/uploads/ static route is mounted correctly
Backend: Transformations contain no euro prices
Backend: Blog posts don't contain specific euro prices
Backend: Settings endpoint returns expected structure
Backend: Sitemap contains all expected blog slugs
Backend: All 26 previous API tests still passing
Frontend: Homepage loads with bigger logo (64px height)
Frontend: Footer has Política de Privacidad link
Frontend: Footer has Términos link
Frontend: Footer has Cancelación y Reembolso link
Frontend: Footer has Blog link
Frontend: NO admin link in footer (removed as requested)
Frontend: Footer has Instagram link (@bariatricaistanbul)
Frontend: Footer has WhatsApp link (wa.me/bariatricistanbul)
Frontend: Footer has Email link (help@bariatricistanbul.com)
Frontend: /politica-de-privacidad page loads with Spanish content
Frontend: /terminos page loads with Spanish content
Frontend: /cancelacion-y-reembolso page loads with Spanish content
Frontend: Admin login page in English (Email, Password, Sign In)
Frontend: Admin dashboard tabs in English (Transformations, Testimonials, Videos, Itinerary, Surgeon, Hospital, Blog)
Frontend: Admin form shows Upload button next to image fields
Frontend: Admin Surgeon tab has Edit button
Frontend: Admin Add New button works
Frontend: CTA section shows help@bariatricistanbul.com
Frontend: CTA section shows @bariatricaistanbul
Frontend: WhatsApp links use wa.me/bariatricistanbul (8 links found)
Frontend: FAQ cost answer says 'presupuesto personalizado' not specific price
Frontend: No euro prices in FAQ section
Frontend: Cookie consent banner visible with privacy policy link
Frontend: Cookie consent links to /politica-de-privacidad
Frontend: Blog listing at /blog shows 3 posts
Frontend: Slider arrows are gold (#D4AF37) and bigger (72px)
Frontend: Mobile text is readable (hero 38px, body 15px)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing seeded content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Admin panel fully in English with Upload buttons, 2) Admin link removed from footer, 3) POST /api/upload works with multipart form, 4) Static files served from /api/uploads/*, 5) 3 Legal pages in Spanish (/politica-de-privacidad, /terminos, /cancelacion-y-reembolso), 6) Email=help@bariatricistanbul.com, 7) Instagram=@bariatricaistanbul, 8) All prices removed (FAQ says presupuesto personalizado), 9) WhatsApp=wa.me/bariatricistanbul, 10) Cookie consent links to privacy policy, 11) Slider arrows are gold and 72px, 12) Mobile text is bigger.
